home.outstandingHint: Positive — owed to you. Negative — you owe.
home.noTransactionsHint: Tap the + button to log your first income, expense, or debt.
home.subtitle: Open balances
home.emptyReceivable: No one currently owes you anything.

transactions.title: All transactions
transactions.searchPlaceholder: Search by contact, note, amount, currency
transactions.exportEmpty: Nothing to export yet — try clearing your filters.
transactions.noMatchesHint: Try a different keyword, or clear the type filter.
transactions.deleteConfirm: Delete this transaction permanently? This cannot be undone.
transactions.autoGeneratedBanner: This transaction was created automatically from a debt. Edit the debt or its payments instead.

quickAdd.pickerTitle: What would you like to record?
quickAdd.summaryOverflowToPayable: Excess {{amount}} will be added to my debt.
quickAdd.summaryOverflowToReceivable: Excess {{amount}} will be added to their debt.
quickAdd.serviceTypeFieldLabel: What service is this transaction for?

card.lent_title: I lent money to this person
card.lent_subtitle: My money given to this person (my receivable) is recorded.
card.borrowed_title: I borrowed money from this person
card.borrowed_subtitle: My debt to be repaid to this person is recorded.
card.received_title: I received money from this person
card.received_subtitle: Deducted from this person's debt to me. After their debt clears, any excess becomes my debt to them.
card.paid_title: I gave money to this person
card.paid_subtitle: Deducted from my debt to this person. After my debt clears, any excess becomes their debt to me.

debts.fullAmountHint: This records {{amount}} and marks the debt as settled.
debts.deletePaymentConfirm: Permanently delete this payment? The debt balance will be recalculated.
debts.deleteConfirm: Delete this debt and all its payments permanently?

auth.resetPasswordInstructions: Enter the email address for your account and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
auth.resetLinkSent: If an account exists for {{email}}, a reset link is on its way.
auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to keep your books up to date.
auth.registerSubtitle: It takes a minute, and your data is end-to-end protected.
auth.confirmEmailNotice: Please confirm your email — we just sent you a link. Then come back here to sign in.
auth.checkInboxBody: We sent a confirmation link to {{email}}. Tap it to finish creating your account, then come back here to sign in.
auth.checkInboxSpamHint: Can't find it? Wait 60 seconds, then check your spam folder.
auth.resendSent: Sent. Check your inbox again in a minute.
auth.googleNotConfigured: Google sign-in is not configured yet.
auth.brandHeadline: Your books, finally in your pocket.
auth.brandSub: Track income, expenses, and what people owe you — across phone, tablet, and web. Bank-grade encryption, zero spreadsheets.

contacts.deleteConfirm: Delete this contact permanently? Past transactions stay in your history but lose the link.
contacts.emptyDescription: Tap + to add your first contact, or pick someone from your phone book.
contacts.emptyPhoneHint: No matches in your phone book.
contacts.addInlineNeedsValue: Fill in at least a phone or a name.
contacts.permissionExplain: We use your phone book only to help you find people you transact with. Nothing is uploaded to the server until you explicitly save a contact.
contacts.permissionDenied: You previously denied access. To re-enable, open your device Settings.
contacts.noActiveDebts: No outstanding balance with this contact.
contacts.noTransactions: No transactions yet with this contact.

settings.themeHint: Choose how the app looks. System follows your device.
settings.languageHint: Changes everywhere in the app instantly.
settings.defaultCurrencyHint: Pre-selected when you record a new income, expense, or debt.

validation.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
validation.passwordWeak: Password must contain an uppercase letter, a lowercase letter, and a digit.
validation.phoneInvalid: Phone must be between 3 and 30 characters.
validation.contactRequired: Pick a contact for this debt.

errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.userAlreadyExists: An account with this email already exists.
errors.userNotFound: No account found with that email.
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
errors.network: Cannot reach the server. Check your internet connection.
errors.emailNotConfirmed: Please confirm your email first — check your inbox (and the spam folder) for the link.
errors.weakPassword: Password is too weak. Use at least 8 characters, mixing letters and numbers.
errors.signupDisabled: New sign-ups are temporarily disabled. Ask the admin to enable email sign-up.
errors.crashHint: Your data is safe. Try again, and if it keeps happening, restart the app.
